context_for_next_testing_agent: All features verified working. The Doggy Company Pet Life Operating System is ready for deployment. All pillars (Celebrate, Dine, Stay), Voice Order, Pet Soul, Admin features (Unified Inbox, Dine Manager, Stay Manager, Service Desk), and Cart functionality are working correctly. No issues found.
